title: Pinyin Resourcepack
description: Minecraft拼音语言资源包，支持全拼、首字母、各种双拼。
body: # Minecraft Pinyin Minecraft拼音语言资源包，支持全拼、首字母、各种双拼。 项目地址：[NorthZeroD/minecraft-pinyin](https://github.com/NorthZeroD/minecraft-pinyin) ![资源包元数据展示](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8057ac1ac66d31f353c45ab9ecdb5553523dccca.webp) ![搜索物品展示](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6cb568ee218e7d22ccc7065cc188e3769ca051c.webp) ## Star History
